title: Korea Peninsula Summary: DPRK Nuclear Buildup Accelerates
contents:
## Korea Peninsula Summary

IAEA confirmed rapid increase in DPRK nuclear manufacturing activities. South Korea stated North Korea operates four uranium enrichment facilities daily. Missile testing tempo accelerated with KN-25 SRBM tests, cruise missile launches from destroyer Choe Hyon, and cluster warhead tests. PRC Foreign Minister Wang Yi visited Pyongyang. Kim signaled openness to Trump dialogue conditioned on accepting nuclear status. Trump-Xi summit for May could create diplomatic opening. North Korea positions for maximum leverage demonstrating advanced capabilities.
